maml:description.maml:para: Gets the desktop monitors information.
Gets the desktop monitors information.
Retrieves information about the desktop monitors connected to the system. You can filter the monitors by index, device ID, device name, connection status, or primary monitor status.
The index of the monitor to get information for.
The device ID of the monitor to get information for.
The device name of the monitor to get information for.
Get information for connected monitors only.
Get information for the primary monitor only.

dev:remarks.maml:para: Retrieves information for all connected desktop monitors.
Get information for a specific monitor by index
Retrieves information for the monitor specified by the index.
Get information for connected monitors only
Retrieves information for all connected monitors only.
Get information for the primary monitor only
Retrieves information for the primary monitor only.

maml:description.maml:para: Registers for desktop monitor change events.
The script block to run when the event is raised.
The duration to monitor before automatically unregistering.
Sets the position of the desktop for one or more monitors.
Sets the position of the desktop for one or more monitors.
Sets the position of the desktop for one or more monitors. You can specify the monitor by index, device ID, or device name. You can also set the position for all monitors or only the primary monitor.
The index of the monitor to set the position for.
The device ID of the monitor to set the position for.
The device name of the monitor to set the position for.
Set the position for the primary monitor only.
The left position of the monitor.
The top position of the monitor.
The right position of the monitor.
The bottom position of the monitor.

command:example.maml:title: ---------- Example 1 ----------
command:example.dev:code:
Set the position for a specific monitor by index
Set-DesktopPosition -Index 1 -Left 0 -Top 0 -Right 1920 -Bottom 1080

command:example.maml:title: ---------- Example 2 ----------
command:example.dev:code:
Set the position for the primary monitor only
Set-DesktopPosition -PrimaryOnly -Left 0 -Top 0 -Right 1920 -Bottom 1080

maml:description.maml:para: Sets the resolution of a desktop monitor.
Sets the resolution of a desktop monitor.
Allows changing the resolution and orientation of a monitor identified by index or device ID.
The index of the monitor.
The device ID of the monitor.
The device name of the monitor.
Set resolution for the primary monitor only.
Resolution width.
Resolution height.
Optional display orientation.
Takes a screenshot of the desktop.
Captures a screenshot of the desktop.
Captures the current desktop image. When a path is provided the image is saved as PNG; otherwise a Bitmap object is returned. The screenshot can target a specific monitor or any region.
Optional path to save the screenshot as a PNG file.
Index of the monitor to capture. Defaults to the entire virtual screen.
Identifier of the monitor to capture.
Name of the monitor to capture.
Capture the primary monitor only.
Left coordinate of the region to capture.
Top coordinate of the region to capture.
Width of the region to capture.
Height of the region to capture.
Gets the current desktop wallpaper for one or more monitors.
Gets the current desktop wallpaper for one or more monitors.

Retrieves the current desktop wallpaper for one or more monitors. You can specify the monitor by index, device ID, or device name. You can also get the wallpaper for all monitors or only the primary monitor.
The index of the monitor to get the wallpaper for.
The device ID of the monitor to get the wallpaper for.
The device name of the monitor to get the wallpaper for.
Get the wallpaper for connected monitors only.
Get the wallpaper for the primary monitor only.

dev:remarks.maml:para: Get the wallpaper for all monitors
Get the wallpaper for a specific monitor by index
Get the wallpaper for the primary monitor only

maml:description.maml:para: Sets the desktop wallpaper for one or more monitors.
Sets the desktop wallpaper for one or more monitors.

Sets the desktop wallpaper for one or more monitors. You can specify the monitor by index, device ID, or device name. You can also set the wallpaper for all monitors or only the primary monitor. Optionally, you can specify the wallpaper position.
The index of the monitor to set the wallpaper for.
The device ID of the monitor to set the wallpaper for.
The device name of the monitor to set the wallpaper for.
Set the wallpaper for connected monitors only.
Set the wallpaper for the primary monitor only.
Set the wallpaper for all monitors.
The position of the wallpaper on the monitor.
The file path of the wallpaper image.

dev:remarks.maml:para: Set the wallpaper for all monitors
Set the wallpaper for a specific monitor by index
Set the wallpaper for the primary monitor only

maml:description.maml:para: Gets information about desktop windows.
Gets information about desktop windows.
Retrieves information about visible windows on the desktop. You can filter windows by name using wildcards.
Filter windows by title. Supports wildcards.

dev:remarks.maml:para: Get windows with "Notepad" in the title

maml:description.maml:para: Sets the position, size and state of a desktop window.
Sets the position, size and state of a desktop window.
Sets the position, size and state of a window on the desktop. You can identify the window by its title (supports wildcards).
The title of the window to move. Supports wildcards.
The left position of the window.
The top position of the window.
The width of the window. If not specified, current width is maintained.
The height of the window. If not specified, current height is maintained.
Target monitor index to move the window to.
The desired window state (Normal, Minimize, Maximize, or Close).
Possible values: Normal, Minimize, Maximize, Close
Set the window as top-most.
Activate the window.

dev:remarks.maml:para: Move a specific window to coordinates (100,100)
